headline: U.S. Bank Wealth Management Appoints Daniel Farley Chief Investment Officer
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, June 16, 2026--U.S. Bank announced today that Daniel Farley, CFA, is its new chief investment officer (CIO) for the Wealth Management Asset Management Group.
